/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/e2ap_integration_test.dir/e2ap_integration_test.cpp.o -o e2ap_integration_test  ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../lib/e2/libocudu_e2.a ../../../lib/asn1/libe2ap_asn1.a ../../unittests/e2/libe2_test_helpers.a ../../../lib/gateways/libocudu_gateway.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a -lgtest -lgtest_main ../../../lib/e2/libocudu_e2.a ../../../lib/asn1/libe2ap_asn1.a ../../../lib/asn1/libasn1_utils.a ../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsctp.so
